name: Capability Curator Context Loader
description: Builds the capability catalog, usage, eval, and existing candidate snapshots used by the Buddy capability curator template.

inputSchema.name: Curator Scope
inputSchema.description: Optional scope object with lookback_days, candidate_limit, include_official, include_user, and focus fields.

outputSchema.name: Capability Catalog Snapshot
outputSchema.description: Action, Tool, and template capability catalog snapshot.

outputSchema.name: Capability Usage Snapshot
outputSchema.description: Recent capability usage events and grouped counters.

outputSchema.name: Eval Snapshot
outputSchema.description: Official template eval suite coverage snapshot.
